ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "predicted_latency" REAL /* Predicted latency of the network */,
  "predicted_cost" REAL /* Predicted cost of the network operation */,
  "predicted_reliability" REAL /* Predicted reliability of the network */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the network segment */,
  "network_segment_id" TEXT /* ID of the network segment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_bandwidth" REAL /* Predicted bandwidth of the network segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the network operation */,
  "latency" REAL /* Actual latency of the network */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Actual reliability of the network */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the network segment */,
  "network_segment_id" TEXT /* ID of the network segment */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Actual bandwidth of the network segment */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Actual packet loss rate */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Actual jitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_range" TEXT /* Date range of the training data used */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction (e.g., comparison with actual metrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES network_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., high latency, low reliability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the anomaly */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly resolution (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., latency, cost, reliability) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, failed, pending) */,
  "report_access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
